description_long: This is a modern, industrial-style faucet with a prominent high-arc spout supported by a visible coiled spring, giving it a robust and flexible appearance. The faucet features a single lever handle on the side for easy water flow and temperature control. The spout is designed with a pull-down or flexible hose mechanism, allowing for extended reach and maneuverability, which is ideal for heavy-duty or commercial use. The body and spout are finished in a dark, likely matte or semi-glossy metallic color, suggesting durability and resistance to corrosion. The overall design is sleek and utilitarian, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on functionality. This type of faucet is commonly found in urban kitchens, garages, or utility sinks where flexibility and reach are important.
description: A robust, high-arc industrial faucet with a coiled spring spout and single lever handle, finished in dark metal. Designed for flexibility and heavy-duty use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the tall, coiled spout and the single lever handle on the right side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full arc of the spout and the spring mechanism, with the handle and base visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the spout and the handle's attachment to the base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the arc and spring, with the spout and base in profile.
